storageImpact: JobRegistry storage is not append-only relative to the pre-change concrete layout: switching the base from GoalOSAccessControl to BusinessOverrideCore introduces businessOverrideNonce and businessOverrideUsed in inherited storage before JobRegistry fields, and maxProtectedLiabilityPerToken/maxSingleReward were inserted before rewardTokenAllowlistEnabled. Treat this as a storage-layout shift that is safe only for fresh deployments or for an explicitly reviewed migration; it must not be used to approve an in-place proxy upgrade.
claimBoundary: Local storage report only; no proxy-upgrade safety approval and no Mainnet deployment evidence.
